CustomField.inlineHelpText: 1. Donor = Gift (Click for Report) 2. Major Donor = Gold Gift (Click for Report) 3. Grantmaker = Coins (Click for Report) 4. Matching Gift = People (Click for Report) 5. Current Member = Blue Bookmark (Click for Report) 6. Lapsed Member = Grey Bookmark (Click for Report)
CustomField.label: Attributes
